articles.title: Europe has ‘maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,’ energy agency head tells AP - AP News
articles.description: The head of the International Energy Agency warns Europe has about six weeks of jet fuel left. In an interview Thursday with The Associated Press, Fatih Birol expressed concerns about possible flight cancellations if oil supplies remain blocked by the Iran wa…
articles.content: PARIS (AP) Europe has maybe six weeks or so (of) jet fuel left, the head of the International Energy Agency said Thursday in a wide-ranging Associated Press interview, warning of possible flight canc… [+2963 chars]

articles.author: Eliza Gkritsi, Ellen O'Regan
articles.title: Online age checks are coming in Europe - politico.eu
articles.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen says the world’s biggest tech platforms have “no more excuses” for not checking users’ ages before letting them access restricted content.
articles.content:
Von der Leyens announcement although technical is indicative of the huge momentum behind social media bans to keep kids and teenagers away from platforms and their addictive algorithms.
